description: Using GNU Octave, analyze the USGS earthquake dataset (earthquakes_2024_jan.csv) located in ~/Documents/datasets/. This CSV contains real earthquake records from January 2024 with magnitude >= 4.0 worldwide. Load the data, extract the magnitude column (column 5, header 'mag'), and create a histogram of earthquake magnitudes with 20 bins. Add the x-axis label 'Magnitude', y-axis label 'Frequency', and the title 'Distribution of Earthquake Magnitudes (Jan 2024, M>=4.0)'. Also compute and display in the Octave command window the mean, median, standard deviation, minimum, and maximum magnitudes. Save the histogram plot as '/home/ga/plots/earthquake_histogram.png'.
